reasoning: The Cincinnati Bengals have consensus sportsbooks odds of +2100 to win Super Bowl 2026, as of May 19, 2025. This carries an implied probability of about 4.5%, which, factoring out the sportsbook vigorish/overround, yields a true probability of ~3.5%-4.0%. Polymarket previously traded at 0.04 on May 15. The Bengals' odds initially improved in March after securing Tee Higgins and Ja'Marr Chase, bringing them from +2000 to +1600, but their heavily criticized 2025 draft class (consistently drawing the lowest grades in their division) pushed their odds back down. My final estimate of 4% aligns directly with both recent Vegas odds and the recent Polymarket baseline.
